items.caption: A vibrant scene from a diy art market at the copeland gallery in south london. the market is bustling with a variety of art pieces, including paintings, prints, and cards, all displayed on a wooden table. the table is adorned with a poster of a person, adding a personal touch to the setting. the art pieces are priced at 50p each, as indicated by the price tags. the market is open on saturday, march 12th, 2016, as stated in the image. the overall atmosphere is lively and colorful, reflecting the creativity and diversity of the art market.
